description: OBD-II Mode 01 PIDs 0xA0-0xBF — NOx Corrected, Cylinder Fuel Rate, Evap Pressure (multi-sensor), Transmission Gear, DEF Dosing, Odometer, NOx Sensors 3&4, Motorcycle I/O (SAE J1979 / ISO 15031-5)

pids.name: NOx Sensor Corrected (B1S1-B2S2)
pids._fix: Rewritten from standard — 9 bytes, scaling is 1 ppm/bit (NOT 0.05), A bits 4-7 = data availability
pids.description: A: bits0-3=sensor support (B1S1/B1S2/B2S1/B2S2), bits4-7=data availability (1=no fault but no results, data=$FFFF). B,C=Corrected NOx B1S1 (1 ppm/bit). D,E=B1S2. F,G=B2S1. H,I=B2S2. Range 0-65535 ppm. $FFFF=not available. Corrected value includes all learned adaptions and offsets.
pids.description_zh: A: 位0-3=传感器支持, 位4-7=数据可用性(1=无故障但无结果, 数据=$FFFF)。B,C=修正NOx B1S1(1 ppm/位)。D,E=B1S2。F,G=B2S1。H,I=B2S2。范围0-65535 ppm。修正值包含所有学习自适应和偏移。

items.label: NOXC_SUP
items._note: bits 0-3: support, bits 4-7: data availability (1=no results, report $FFFF)

pids.name: Cylinder Fuel Rate
pids._fix: Rewritten from standard — 2 bytes, NO support bitmap, 0.03125 mg/stroke/bit
pids.description: No support bitmap. A,B=Cylinder fuel rate (0.03125 mg/stroke/bit, range 0-2047.97 mg/stroke). Amount of fuel injected per cylinder per intake stroke. Zero when engine off.
pids.description_zh: 无支持位图。A,B=气缸燃油率(0.03125 mg/冲程/位, 范围0-2047.97)。每缸每进气冲程喷射燃油量。发动机关闭时为零。

pids.name: Evap System Vapor Pressure (multi-sensor)
pids.name_zh: 蒸发系统蒸汽压力(多传感器)
pids._fix: Rewritten from standard — 9 bytes: A=support, B-I=4 pressure values (2 sensors × 2 ranges)
pids.description: A=support (bit0=EVAP A, bit1=EVAP A wide, bit2=EVAP B, bit3=EVAP B wide, bits4-7=reserved). Same sensor must not be supported with two ranges. B,C=EVAP A (signed, 0.25 Pa/bit, -8192~8191.75 Pa). D,E=EVAP A wide (signed, 2 Pa/bit, -65536~65534 Pa). F,G=EVAP B (signed, 0.25 Pa/bit). H,I=EVAP B wide (signed, 2 Pa/bit). Mutually exclusive with PIDs $32 and $54.
pids.description_zh: A=支持(位0=EVAP A, 位1=EVAP A宽范围, 位2=EVAP B, 位3=EVAP B宽范围)。同一传感器不能同时支持两种范围。B,C=EVAP A(有符号, 0.25 Pa/位)。D,E=EVAP A宽(有符号, 2 Pa/位)。F,G/H,I同B传感器。与PID $32和$54互斥。

pids.name: Transmission Actual Gear
pids._fix: Rewritten from standard — 4 bytes: A=support, B=actual gear(bits 4-7), C,D=actual gear ratio(0.001/bit)
pids.description: A: bit0=Actual gear supported, bit1=Actual gear ratio supported. B: bits0-3=reserved, bits4-7=Actual gear (0000=Neutral, 0001-1111=Gear 1-15). C,D=Actual gear ratio (0.001/bit, range 0-65.535).

pids.name: Diesel Exhaust Fluid Dosing
pids._fix: Rewritten from standard — 4 bytes: A=support, B=commanded dosing(0.5%/bit), C,D=DEF usage current cycle(0.0005 L/bit)
pids.description: A: bit0=Commanded DEF dosing supported, bit1=DEF usage current driving cycle supported. B=Commanded DEF dosing (0.5%/bit, 0-100%, 0%=no dosing, 100%=max). C,D=DEF usage for current driving cycle (0.0005 L/bit, 0-32.7675 L). Reset to zero on subsequent engine start.
pids.description_zh: A: 位0=指令DEF喷射支持, 位1=当前驾驶周期DEF用量支持。B=指令DEF喷射(0.5%/位, 0-100%)。C,D=当前驾驶周期DEF用量(0.0005 L/位, 0-32.7675 L)。下次发动机启动时归零。

pids.name: Odometer
pids.description: Vehicle odometer visible to operator. 4 bytes unsigned, 0.1 km/bit. Range 0-429,496,729.5 km. Reported by single ECU. Shall not be reset by Service $04. $FFFFFFFF = not available. Updated min 1 second. Continues in key-on engine-off.
pids.description_zh: 对驾驶员可见的车辆里程表。4字节无符号, 0.1 km/位。范围0-429,496,729.5 km。单ECU报告。不会被服务$04重置。$FFFFFFFF=不可用。最少1秒更新。钥匙开发动机关也报告。

pids.name: NOx Sensor (B1S3-B2S4)
pids._fix: Rewritten from standard — 9 bytes, 4 sensors, 1 ppm/bit, A bits 4-7 = data availability
pids.description: Raw uncorrected NOx. A: bits0-3=sensor support (B1S3/B1S4/B2S3/B2S4), bits4-7=data availability (1=no fault but no results, data=$FFFF). B,C=NOx B1S3 (1 ppm/bit). D,E=B1S4. F,G=B2S3. H,I=B2S4. Range 0-65535 ppm.
pids.description_zh: 原始未修正NOx。A: 位0-3=传感器支持, 位4-7=数据可用性。B,C=NOx B1S3(1 ppm/位)。D,E=B1S4。F,G=B2S3。H,I=B2S4。范围0-65535 ppm。

pids.name: NOx Sensor Corrected (B1S3-B2S4)
pids._fix: Rewritten from standard — 9 bytes, 4 sensors, 1 ppm/bit, A bits 4-7 = data availability
pids.description: Corrected NOx (includes all learned adaptions/offsets). Same structure as PID $A7 but corrected values. A: bits0-3=sensor support, bits4-7=data availability. B,C=Corrected NOx B1S3 (1 ppm/bit). D,E=B1S4. F,G=B2S3. H,I=B2S4.
pids.description_zh: 修正NOx(包含所有学习自适应/偏移)。与PID $A7结构相同但为修正值。A: 位0-3=传感器支持, 位4-7=数据可用性。B,C=修正NOx B1S3(1 ppm/位)。

pids.name: Motorcycle Input/Output Status
pids._fix: Rewritten from standard — 2 bytes: A=support bitmap, B=status bitmap
pids.description: A: bit0=ABS Disable Switch supported, bits1-7=reserved. B: bit0=ABS Disable Switch state (0=ABS not disabled, 1=ABS disabled), bits1-7=reserved. PTO status defined in PID $1E.
pids.description_zh: A: 位0=ABS禁用开关支持, 位1-7=保留。B: 位0=ABS禁用开关状态(0=ABS未禁用, 1=ABS已禁用), 位1-7=保留。PTO状态在PID $1E中定义。
